utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. All 7 appear in the final package. Check if fully specified: 
- destination: provided (Prague, Czech Republic) – sufficient.
- travel_dates: specific dates provided – sufficient.
- transportation: flight details with costs – has type, details, and a single total cost; flight details sufficiently specified per format (though no times/airline names, format only asks for flight details with costs) – sufficient.
- accommodation: hotel selection with costs – has name, duration, cost – sufficient.
- activities: selected activities with costs – list with names and individual costs – sufficient.
- additional_services: any extra services with costs – marked as None – acceptable.
- total_budget: complete cost breakdown – provided as a single total figure (€615). The format asks for “complete cost breakdown,” but the package includes individual costs for transport, accommodation, activities and a total. That constitutes a breakdown – sufficient.
All 7 items are included and sufficiently specified according to the requested format.
